title: liparis transtillata
intro: Liparis transtillata, also known as the yellow lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Liparis transtillata include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal preparations, Liparis transtillata is often used in infusions, decoctions, or combined with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
